title.en: China-to-Paraguay Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入巴拉圭：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入巴拉圭：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Paraguay INTN conformity expectations, ANDE technical connection approval, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility interface requirements, IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 EMC evidence, and 50 Hz 220/380 V grid settings — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与巴拉圭INTN合格评定预期、ANDE技术接入批准、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口要求、IEC 62920及IEC 61000 EMC证据、50 Hz 220/380 V电网参数——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與巴拉圭INTN合格評定預期、ANDE技術接入批准、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網介面要求、IEC 62920及IEC 61000 EMC證據、50 Hz 220/380 V電網參數——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, INTN conformity scope determination, ANDE grid-connection approval, customs determination, project approval, or market-access approval. Paraguay's electricity system is dominated by hydro generation from Itaipu and Yacyreta, and solar distributed generation is still emerging; exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current INTN standards adoption, ANDE connection requirements, project-owner requirements, and any local professional engineering obligations before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、INTN合格评定范围裁定、ANDE并网批准、海关裁定、项目批准或市场准入批准。巴拉圭电力系统以Itaipu和Yacyreta水电为主，分布式太阳能仍处于发展阶段；出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应核实现行INTN标准采纳情况、ANDE接入要求、项目业主要求及任何当地专业工程义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、INTN合格評定範圍裁定、ANDE併網批准、海關裁定、項目批准或市場准入批准。巴拉圭電力系統以Itaipu和Yacyreta水電為主，分散式太陽能仍處於發展階段；出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應核實現行INTN標準採納情況、ANDE接入要求、項目業主要求及任何當地專業工程義務。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Paraguay, the key practical gaps are: (1) confirming INTN recognition or acceptance of NP/IEC evidence for the specific inverter model; (2) obtaining ANDE technical approval and connection conditions for the project; (3) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence; (4) IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence; (5) IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence; and (6) firmware validation for Paraguay's 50 Hz, 220/380 V grid. China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 baselines are useful engineering references but should not be treated as automatically accepted substitutes for INTN conformity or ANDE grid-connection review.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口巴拉圭时，主要实际差距包括：（1）确认INTN是否认可或接受特定逆变器型号的NP/IEC证据；（2）取得项目所需的ANDE技术批准和接入条件；（3）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据；（4）IEC 62116防孤岛及IEC 61727公用电网接口证据；（5）IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC证据；（6）针对巴拉圭50 Hz、220/380 V电网的固件验证。中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024可作为工程参考，但不应视为可自动替代INTN合格评定或ANDE并网审查。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口巴拉圭時，主要實際差距包括：（1）確認INTN是否認可或接受特定逆變器型號的NP/IEC證據；（2）取得項目所需的ANDE技術批准和接入條件；（3）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據；（4）IEC 62116防孤島及IEC 61727公用電網介面證據；（5）IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC證據；（6）針對巴拉圭50 Hz、220/380 V電網的韌體驗證。中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024可作為工程參考，但不應視為可自動替代INTN合格評定或ANDE併網審查。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
